title: Every Creature in the Galapagos Has a Mate Except Me
description:
An excerpt from Fancy Meeting You by Louise Marburg On the splintery old dock where we wait for the flotilla of Zodiacs that will ferry us out to the Galapagos Magic, a sea lion lazes in the sun, apparently fast asleep. “Aw,” someone says, “isn’t he cute?” There is a flurry of picture taking, both […]

The post Every Creature in the Galapagos Has a Mate Except Me appeared first on
hook: A woman on a solo trip to the Galápagos watches paired animals and confronts what it means to arrive somewhere utterly alone.

title: Crimes of Fashion: Sofia Coppola’s “Pseudy Portrait” of Marc Jacobs
description: "Sofia’s crime is not her betrayal of the documentarian’s fiduciary duty to biographical explication but the tasteful neutering of Marc’s histrionic import"
hook: Sofia Coppola's Marc Jacobs documentary commits the cardinal sin of making a histrionic life tasteful—and that's the real betrayal.

title: God Save the Children
description: Exploring the perils of intercountry adoption.
hook: Intercountry adoption sold as salvation myth masks a darker machinery of extraction, loss, and who gets to decide what counts as rescue.
